content: An international group of researchers have investigated the role of memory in quantum systems and dynamics. Their findings show that a quantum process can appear memoryless from one perspective while retaining memory from another. The discovery opens new research avenues into quantum systems and technologies.

metadata.feedTitle: Phys.org - latest science and technology news stories
metadata.summary: An international group of researchers have investigated the role of memory in quantum systems and dynamics. The discovery opens new research avenues into quantum systems and technologies
